channel.title: USO on Alien Truth Social
channel.description: Recent content in USO on Alien Truth Social

item.title: Unidentified Submerged Object
item.description:
An unidentified submerged object (USO) is an object that is unidentified and submerged in water. The U.S. Navy categorizes USOs as marine life that can disrupt naval operations. The term USO has also been used by ufologists to describe unidentified flying objects that may also travel underwater.

Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Unidentified_submerged_object
